song.title: Divine Sympathy
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus, my sorrow lies too deep For human ministry; It knows not how to tell itself To any but to Thee.
[V2] 2) Thou dost remember still, amid The glories of God’s throne, The sorrows of mortality, For they were once Thine own.
[V3] 3) Jesus, my fainting spirit brings Its fearfulness to Thee. Thine eye, at least, can penetrate The clouded mystery.
[V4] 4) And is it not, O Lord, enough, This holy sympathy? There is no sorrow e’er so deep But I may bring to Thee
song.author: Theodosia Wingfield Powerscourt
